productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Black Backpack
description: Style Note If you want a bag that's funky, stylish, super cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this backpack from united colors of benetton. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A stunningly good looking bag, with loads of space, it'll become your best buddy in no time. Be prepared to be swept off your feet by this awesome backpack! Product Details A black and grey backpack with an embroidered brand logo appliqued in front Two padded adjustable shoulder straps and one mesh padded short handle on top Padded back One main zippered compartment with a concealed internal pocket One small zippered compartment in front with organizer pockets One open mesh pocket on the right Material and Care 80% nylon and 20% polyurethane exterior with 100% polyester lining Do not wash, bleach, iron, dry clean or tumble dry Wipe surface with a clean dry cloth when necessary Size Height: 44 cm Width: 31 cm Depth: 18 cm
